<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band07_chunk005.pdf#page=11 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band07 p220 -->

<!-- header: MARIA THALHEI -->

<!-- header: MARIA THALHEIM -->


[[File:Band07_chunk005_p011_img001.jpg|thumb|C<sub>d</sub> Rosenstrauch]]



[[File:Band07_chunk005_p011_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk005_p011_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk005_p011_img004.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk005_p011_img005.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk005_p011_img006.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk005_p011_img007.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band07_chunk005_p011_img008.jpg|thumb|C. . Marien-Embler]]



----
2 2 T
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band07 p221 -->
